2604.13318.title: WebXSkill: Skill Learning for Autonomous Web Agents
2604.13318.paper_summary: Autonomous web agents powered by large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in completing complex browser tasks, yet they still struggle with long-horizon workflows. A key bottleneck is the grounding gap in existing skill formulations: textual workflow skills provide natural language guidance but cannot be directly executed, while code-based skills are executable but opaque to the agent, offering no step-level understanding for error recovery or adaptation. We introduce WebXSkill, a framework that bridges this gap with executable skills, each pairing a parameterized action program with step-level natural language guidance, enabling both direct execution and agent-driven adaptation. WebXSkill operates in three stages: skill extraction mines reusable action subsequences from readily available synthetic agent trajectories and abstracts them into parameterized skills, skill organization indexes skills into a URL-based graph for context-aware retrieval, and skill deployment exposes two complementary modes, grounded mode for fully automated multi-step execution and guided mode where skills serve as step-by-step instructions that the agent follows with its native planning. On WebArena and WebVoyager, WebXSkill improves task success rate by up to 9.8 and 12.9 points over the baseline, respectively, demonstrating the effectiveness of executable skills for web agents. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/aiming-lab/WebXSkill.
2604.13318.paper_summary_zh: 自主網頁代理商由大型語言模型（LLMs）驅動，已顯示出在完成複雜瀏覽器任務方面的潛力，但在長期工作流程上仍然面臨挑戰。一個主要的瓶頸是現有技能表述中的基礎差距：文本工作流程技能提供自然語言指導，但無法直接執行，而基於代碼的技能則可執行但對代理商來說不透明，無法提供逐步的理解以進行錯誤恢復或適應。我們介紹了WebXSkill，這是一個通過可執行技能彌合這一差距的框架，每個技能將參數化的動作程序與逐步的自然語言指導配對，使得既能直接執行又能進行代理驅動的適應。WebXSkill運作分為三個階段：技能提取從現成的合成代理軌跡中挖掘可重用的動作子序列並將其抽象為參數化技能，技能組織將技能索引到基於URL的圖中以便於上下文感知的檢索，技能部署則提供兩種互補模式，基於基礎的模式用於完全自動化的多步執行，而指導模式則將技能作為代理商依據其本地規劃遵循的逐步指令。在WebArena和WebVoyager上，WebXSkill分別提高了任務成功率高達9.8和12.9個百分點，展示了可執行技能對網頁代理商的有效性。代碼可在https://github.com/aiming-lab/WebXSkill公開獲得。
2604.13318.author: Zhaoyang Wang et.al.
2604.13318.authors: Zhaoyang Wang, Qianhui Wu, Xuchao Zhang, Chaoyun Zhang, Wenlin Yao, Fazle Elahi Faisal, Baolin Peng, Si Qin, Suman Nath, Qingwei Lin, Chetan Bansal, Dongmei Zhang, Saravan Rajmohan, Jianfeng Gao, Huaxiu Yao
